label: The Gate of Parco Ciani
description: An ornate wrought iron gate in Lugano's Parco Ciani that frames a picturesque view of Lake Lugano and the surrounding mountains. It is a famous photo spot featuring stone pillars with spherical finials and a pebble mosaic foreground.
search_prompt: ornate wrought iron gate with stone pillars and sphere finials overlooking a lake and mountains

label: Monte San Salvatore from Parco Ciani
description: A scenic view of the cone-shaped Monte San Salvatore mountain across Lake Lugano, typically framed by vibrant flower beds along the Parco Ciani promenade.
search_prompt: cone-shaped mountain across a lake with colorful flower beds in the foreground

label: Helidon Xhixha's Earth sculpture
description: A large, polished stainless steel sphere with a jagged, topographical indentation that reflects the surrounding landscape of Parco Ciani and Lake Lugano.
search_prompt: large polished mirror-like metal sphere sculpture with jagged relief indentation in a park

label: Monte San Salvatore and flowers
description: A scenic view from Parco Ciani in Lugano featuring a field of poppies in the foreground with Lake Lugano and the iconic conical Monte San Salvatore in the background.

label: Parco Ciani Event Graphics

label: Woman at Parco Ciani

label: LongLake Festival Info Point
description: A red shipping container repurposed as an information hub and shop for the LongLake Festival in Parco Ciani. It is situated on a grassy lawn surrounded by blue branded deck chairs and outdoor seating.

label: Socrates Statue in Parco Ciani
description: A white marble sculpture depicting the Greek philosopher Socrates in a seated, contemplative pose within a park setting.

label: Red benches of Parco Ciani
description: Distinctive bright red wooden park benches found throughout Parco Ciani in Lugano, Switzerland. They are a signature feature of the park's landscape and a popular spot for tourist photos.

label: Parco Ciani lakeside garden view
description: A recurring scenic view from Parco Ciani featuring vibrant flower beds in the foreground overlooking Lake Lugano. The backdrop prominently features the iconic pyramid-shaped Monte San Salvatore across the water.

label: Monte San Salvatore mountain view
description: The iconic cone-shaped peak of Monte San Salvatore overlooking Lake Lugano, which serves as a popular scenic backdrop for tourist photos in Parco Ciani.

label: Lagoon Punk Rock Fest posters
